description: Style Note This season's french connection line features bold animal prints in bags with fantastical bursts of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift  to your season wardrobe.  Product Details Purple pleated clutch with a flap that has a magnetic button closure Has a fabric inner and a mobile slot Material and Care 100% polyester Wipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Size Height: 16 cm Width: 32 cm Style NoteThis season's French Connection line features clutch with fantastical bursts of colour in the high street brand's attitudinal style. Add to this potent mix a simplistic design and minimalistic hardware and we have this lust-worthy piece, perfect to add that refined facelift  to your season wardrobe. Product DetailsPurple pleated clutch with a flap that has a magnetic button closureHas a fabric inner and a mobile slotMaterial and Care100% polyesterWipe with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 16 cmWidth: 30 cm
